title: The data-alignment dimension (data DNA)
concept: extend the v1.0 alignment framework to DATA — reuse manifest/score/diff structure, one-sided (seeder output -> live schema) with STRUCTURAL operators; separate harness, not an alignctl runner (M7b-D3)
two_jobs: catalog (enumerate seedable surfaces = the M7c checklist) + conformance-gate/drift-detector (introspect captures the contract, measure scores conformance, diff flags schema drift)

tests.gates: build + vet + -race + gofmt clean; hermetic (fake Introspector, no live DB)

live_proof.introspect: captured full live shapes (seeded-only): organizations 10 cols, users 9, memberships 26 cols/4 FKs, casbin-grant 7
live_proof.measure: Overall 100% / Critical 100% across the 4 seeded surfaces (type-match, NOT-NULL + UNIQUE, fk-valid on memberships' 4 FKs, row-count)
live_proof.diff: baseline clean (exit 0) -> add column -> 'DRIFT: added-column' (exit 1) -> revert -> clean (exit 0)

bug_caught_by_proof: introspect was populating PLANNED surfaces (where the table exists) -> Validate rejects (planned must be empty) -> measure/diff aborted. Fixed: introspect captures seeded surfaces only.
harden: wired the UNIQUE leg of constraint-satisfied (PgIntrospector.CountDuplicates + pg.CountDuplicatesSQL) — was silently a no-op; now active (verified live: '1 UNIQUE column(s) satisfied')

decisions.M7b-D1: extend M0 to a data dimension, don't fork it (design)
decisions.M7b-D2: the data-DNA is the catalog that drives M7c (design)
decisions.M7b-D3: separate datadna harness, not a new alignctl runner (build)
decisions.M7b-D4: the live proof caught the planned-surface bug + drove the UNIQUE-leg harden

delivers: the data dimension in corpus/architecture/alignment_testing.md + rosetta-extensions/stack-seeding/dna/ (manifest, harness, CLI, README)
